scripts.dist:web: npm run build:web && npm run build:demo -w @screenshot/web-plugin
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist -w @screenshot/desktop
scripts.dist:desktop:portable: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$src='apps/desktop/release/win-unpacked/ScreenShot.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $src)) { throw 'win-unpacked not found; run npm run dist:desktop once (or build unpacked) first.' }; $out='apps/desktop/release/ScreenShot-win-portable.zip'; if (Test-Path $out) { Remove-Item $out -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'apps/desktop/release/win-unpacked/*' -DestinationPath $out"
